stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Assuming suction feeding is not possible, which engine(s) can be fed if the right hand fuel pump fails?

options.a: The left fuel pump can feed Engine 2 provided the crossfeed valve (6) is opened.
options.b: Engine 1 only, engine 2 will be starved of fuel.
options.c: The left fuel pump can feed Engine 2 provided the crossfeed valve (5) is opened.
options.d: Both engines can be fed, provided the crossfeed valve (5) remains closed.
